name: eucalyptus
description: Turn Excel workbooks into API-backed Eucalyptus calculation models through the Eucalyptus MCP server.

interface.longDescription: Install Eucalyptus workflows for uploading Excel workbooks, compiling model IO, running playground calculations, setting API destination defaults, and reading logs or metrics.
defaultPrompt: Use Eucalyptus to list my Excel-backed API models and summarize the available compiled versions.
Use Eucalyptus to upload this workbook as a new API model version and run a playground calculation.
